metadata.analysis_scope: Aggregate analysis across selected run databases; CRTC is taken from its dedicated finished run and excluded from rest-batch.
metadata.privacy: Only aggregate values are emitted; person names and contact fields are excluded.
limitations: The observed per-org people count has a hard ceiling of 25, strongly indicating source-page pagination censoring; workforce and title totals are lower bounds.
Keyword categories are bilingual heuristics and may include false positives or miss specialized titles.
Same-name collision candidates are not confirmed duplicates.

quality_checks.check: People in complete or queue-drained departments
Org units in complete or queue-drained departments
Org units at observed people ceiling (25)
Duplicate person URLs across selected sources
Duplicate org DNs across selected sources
Forbidden contact columns in persisted schema
